dscrCalculation: Lesser of the lease or Form 1007/1025
1007/1025 may be used for gross rents if within 20% tolerance of actual lease
Lease may be used with 2 months canceled checks to support higher rent
shortTermRental: Purchase and Refinance: 100% of income documented by 12 month history of deposits from eligible sources like Airbnb or VRBO
Purchase Only: 75% of income documented by 1007 or property management report
Short term rent is not permitted on 5-10 unit properties
income.realEstateOwned: List all properties to meet the experience requirement and those properties associated to mortgage liabilities on credit

rows.notes: (5) LTV > 80% requires min 740 FICO, min DSCR 1.00, 12mo PITIA reserves, no first time investors, 0x30x12, delegated correspondent not eligible, must have experience owning 2+ unit property

ltvMatrices.notes: (3) 2-4 Units and Condos Max LTV Purchase 75% / Refinance 70%. Interest only requires 700 FICO and max LTV 75%. Vacant properties ineligible for refinances. 5% LTV reduction on declining markets. Min $150,000 loan amount. No Non-Warrantable Condo. No Condotel. Mortgage History 0x30x12. First time investors not allowed. 12 Months Reserves Required.

(3) Additional: 2-4 Units and Condos Max LTV Purchase 75% / Refinance 70%. Interest only requires 700 FICO and max LTV 70%. LTV > 65% max cash out $500,000. LTV <= 65% max cash out $1,000,000. Vacant properties ineligible for refinances. 5% LTV reduction on declining markets. Min $150,000 loan. No Non-Warrantable Condo. No Condotel. Mortgage History 0x30x12. First time investors not allowed. 12 Months Reserves Required.
(4) Same restrictions as DSCR >= 0.75 < 1.00 PLUS: LTV > 65% max cash out $500,000, LTV <= 65% max cash out $1,000,000.

rules: FICO 680-719 and LTV > 70% OR FICO 660-679 and LTV > 65%:
2-4 Units and Condos Max LTV Purchase 75% / Refinance 70%
Interest only requires 700 FICO and max LTV 75%
2-4 Units and Condos Max LTV Purchase 75% / Refinance 70%
Interest only requires 700 FICO and max LTV 70%
Borrower must have experience owning a 2+ unit property
6 mo. min reserves, 12 mo. for > $1.5MM Original Principal Balance
1 unit permitted to be unleased/vacant on RT/CO transaction, 75% of market rent used to qualify

product.fixedProducts: 30 Year fixed or 40 Year fixed interest only

prepaymentPenalty.type: Fixed percentage 1-5 year term with a 5% fixed penalty
prepaymentPenalty.declining: Declining structure starting at 5% with a floor of 3%

product.escrows: Escrow waiver allowed with conditions, see client guide

cashOutRefinance_3months.maxLoanAmount: Lesser of $750,000 or purchase price plus improvements

product.landContract: Eligible as rate and term refinance if seasoned 12 months with payment history 0x30 for 12 months supported by canceled checks
product.delayedFinancing: Eligible when property purchased for cash within 180 days of loan application. Rate and Term loan/LTV limits apply.

achRequirements: Required on all cash out refinances with a qualifying score below 700
Required on all cash out refinances with an LTV greater than 70%
Required on all DSCR ratios less than 1
borrower.experience: Must own an investment property for 12 months during the last 3 years. 5-10 unit properties require experience owning a 2+ unit property on purchase transactions (case-by-case exceptions may be permitted).
borrower.firstTimeInvestor: Must own primary residence for 12 months during the last 3 years (Max 75% LTV). 5-10 unit properties require experience. First time investors are not permitted.
borrower.exposure: No more than $5,000,000 or 15 properties to one single borrower

decisionCreditScore.method: Lower of two or middle of three. Use lowest decision score among all borrowers.

credit.mortgageStatus: Primary and Subject Mortgage must be current at time of closing
credit.mortgageRating: 1x30x12 months for Primary and Subject Mortgage. 5-10 unit properties require 0x30x12 on primary and subject.
credit.mortgagePrimaryRating: If reporting on credit for 12 months, most recent 60 days not required
credit.covidForbearance: Eligible if all missed payments are repaid or 3 regular payments over 90 days have been paid after forbearance has ended.
credit.chargeOffsAndCollections: Can be ignored unless title impacted
credit.judgmentsAndLiens: All open judgments, garnishments, and outstanding liens affecting title must be paid off prior to or at closing
credit.tradelines: One (1) active tradeline rated for 24 months and Two (2) tradelines rated 12 months open or closed. One (1) mortgage tradeline rated for 12 months open or closed in last 24 months and One (1) additional tradeline.

reserves.purchaseException: 3 Months PITIA with credit score >= 720 and LTV <= 80

assetsReserves.concessions: Not to exceed 6%, must be used for closing costs and prepaids

appraisalRequirements.deskReview: Required on all loans or CU Score of 2.5 or less with restrictions

property.appraisalTransfers: Allowed with signed transfer letter from lender, invoice, and first generation report

listedForSale.rateTerm: Listing must be canceled prior to application date
listedForSale.cashOut: Listing must be canceled 90 days prior to application date
listedForSale.valuationRule: Lesser of recent list price or appraised value within 6 months of listing

maxBrokerFees.loanAmountLt150k: 5% in aggregate (includes borrower paid, lender paid, business purpose premium, total fee compensation)
maxBrokerFees.loanAmountGte150k: 3% for compensation (borrower paid, lender paid, business purpose premium). 5% total fee aggregate.
maxBrokerFees.stackingFees: Not allowed to exceed max compensation

incomeTypes: Full Document: 1 or 2 Years - W-2 & Paystubs - Tax Returns
Bank Statements: Personal or Business - 12 or 24 Months
Bank Statements: 2 Years self-employed in same business required

bankStatementExpenseRatio.expenseLetter: Letter from CPA/accountant, IRS enrolled agent, or tax preparer subject to minimum total expense percentage of 10%
bankStatementExpenseRatio.profitAndLossStatement: Expense factor provided on a P&L prepared by CPA/accountant, IRS enrolled agent, or tax preparer subject to minimum 10%

income.residualIncome: Minimum $1,250 plus $250 for first dependent then $125 for each additional dependent to max $1,750

product.fixedProducts: 30 Year fixed or 40 Year fixed interest only

prepaymentPenalty.type: Fixed percentage 1-5 year term with a 5% fixed penalty
prepaymentPenalty.declining: Declining structure starting at 5% with a floor of 3%

cashOutRefinance_3months.maxLoanAmount: Lesser of $750,000 or purchase price plus improvements

product.secondaryFinancing: Max CLTV restricted to max qualifying LTV
product.landContract: Eligible as RT refi if seasoned 12 months with 0x30 for 12 months supported by canceled checks
product.texasCashOut: Max 80% LTV. Financed points cannot exceed 80% LTV. 12 day waiting period required.
product.delayedFinancing: Eligible when property purchased for cash within 180 days of loan application. Purchase loan/LTV limits apply.

borrower.firstTimeInvestor: Must own primary residence for 12 months during the last 3 years (Max 80% LTV)
borrower.exposure: No more than $5,000,000 or 15 properties to one single borrower

qualifyingCreditScore.method: Lower of two or middle of three. Use decision score for primary wage earner. All borrowers must meet minimum.

credit.mortgageStatus: Primary and Subject Mortgage must be current at time of closing

mortgageRating.exception: 1x30x12 by exception only: Max LTV 75%, Max Loan Amount $1,500,000

creditEventSeasoning.standard: BK, FC, SS, FB, Mod require 36 month seasoning
creditEventSeasoning.exception: 24 month seasoning by exception only: Max LTV 75%, Max Loan Amount $1,500,000

credit.covidForbearance: Eligible if all missed payments repaid or 3 regular payments over 90 days paid after forbearance ended
credit.chargeOffsAndCollections: Individual collection and non-mortgage charge-off >= $250, and accounts totaling > $2,000, must be paid in full. Medical collections excluded up to $10,000 cumulative.
credit.judgmentsAndLiens: All open judgments, garnishments, and outstanding liens affecting title must be paid off prior to or at closing
credit.tradelines: One (1) active tradeline rated 24 months and Two (2) tradelines rated 12 months open or closed. One (1) mortgage tradeline rated 12 months open or closed in last 24 months and One (1) additional tradeline.

assetsReserves.assets: Seasoned for 60 days. Large deposits exceeding 50% of qualifying income must be sourced.

reserves.purchaseException: 3 Months PITIA with credit score >= 720 and LTV <= 80

concessions.usage: Must be used for closing costs and prepaids

rural.comps: At least two comps must be within 5 miles of the subject property
rural.road: Property must be located on a paved road. No dirt roads.

appraisalRequirements.deskReview: Required on all loans or CU Score of 2.5 or less with restrictions

property.appraisalTransfers: Allowed with signed transfer letter from lender, invoice, and first generation report

listedForSale.cashOut: Listing must be canceled 90 days prior to application date
listedForSale.valuationRule: Lesser of recent list price or appraised value within 6 months of listing

maxBrokerFees.stackingFees: Not allowed to exceed max compensation

Asset Qualifier: Assets post close must be greater than 110% of the loan amount + reserves
Asset Qualifier: Income equals Qualified Assets / 60 months
Asset Income Lift: Income equals Qualified Assets / 120 months
Asset Income Lift: Must be paired with Full Doc, Bank Statements, or 1099 Income
